keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Turks and Caicos Islands 0, British Virgin Islands 1. Joshua Bertie (British Virgin Islands) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Miguel Marshall.
Substitution, British Virgin Islands. Phillip Nelson replaces Jerry Wiltshire because of an injury.
Goal!  Turks and Caicos Islands 1, British Virgin Islands 1. Billy Forbes (Turks and Caicos Islands) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Luka Chalwell (British Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Robert Green IV (British Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Wildens Delva (Turks and Caicos Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Turks and Caicos Islands 1, British Virgin Islands 1.
Second Half begins Turks and Caicos Islands 1, British Virgin Islands 1.
Substitution, British Virgin Islands. Jake Forbes replaces Robert Green IV.
Tyler Forbes (British Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card.
Junior Paul (Turks and Caicos Islands) is shown the yellow card.
T'Sharne Gallimore (British Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Turks and Caicos Islands 2, British Virgin Islands 1. Billy Forbes (Turks and Caicos Islands) from a free kick with a left footed shot to the top right corner.
Billy Forbes (Turks and Caicos Islands) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
Substitution, British Virgin Islands. Johari Lacey replaces Joshua Bertie.
Substitution, British Virgin Islands. Justin Smith replaces Kristian Javier.
Substitution, Turks and Caicos Islands. James Rene replaces Herby Magny.
Substitution, Turks and Caicos Islands. Emmanuel Martin replaces Cory Williams.
Substitution, British Virgin Islands. Azarni Callwood replaces Phillip Nelson.
Azarni Callwood (British Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Turks and Caicos Islands. Roguel Aneston replaces Karl Shand.
Kavon Caesar (British Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal!  Turks and Caicos Islands 2, British Virgin Islands 2. Justin Smith (British Virgin Islands) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Tyler Forbes   following a fast break.
Christopher Louisy (Turks and Caicos Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Emmanuel Martin (Turks and Caicos Islands) is shown the yellow card.
Second Half ends, Turks and Caicos Islands 2, British Virgin Islands 2.
